formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Human Development Index (HDI)",
    "formula": "HDI = (Life Expectancy Index + Education Index + Income Index)/3",
    "variables": "Life Expectancy Index, Education Index, Income Index",
    "units": "Life Expectancy Index (0-1), Education Index (0-1), Income Index (0-1)",
    "notes": "HDI is a composite indicator that reflects the average achievement in three basic dimensions of human development: a long and healthy life, knowledge, and a decent standard of living."
  },
  {
    "name": "Poverty Line",
    "formula": "Poverty Line = (Minimum Daily Expenditure)/365",
    "variables": "Minimum Daily Expenditure",
    "units": "INR (Indian Rupees)",
    "notes": "Poverty Line is the minimum amount of income required to meet the basic needs of an individual."
  },
  {
    "name": "Basic Needs Approach",
    "formula": "Basic Needs Approach = Food, Shelter, Clothing, Healthcare, Education",
    "variables": "Food, Shelter, Clothing, Healthcare, Education",
    "units": "-",
    "notes": "Basic Needs Approach is a development strategy that focuses on meeting the basic needs of the poor and vulnerable populations."
  },
  {
    "name": "Human Development Approach",
    "formula": "Human Development Approach = Longevity, Knowledge, and Income",
    "variables": "Longevity, Knowledge, Income",
    "units": "Longevity (life expectancy), Knowledge (education), Income (GDP per capita)",
    "notes": "Human Development Approach is a development strategy that focuses on improving the well-being and capabilities of individuals and communities."
  },
  {
    "name": "Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs)",
    "formula": "SDGs = 17 Goals, 169 Targets, and 230 Indicators",
    "variables": "17 Goals, 169 Targets, 230 Indicators",
    "units": "-",
    "notes": "SDGs are a set of global development goals that aim to end poverty, protect the planet, and ensure peace and prosperity for all."
  },
  {
    "name": "Gross National Income (GNI) per capita",
    "formula": "GNI per capita = Total GNI / Population",
    "variables": "Total GNI, Population",
    "units": "GNI per capita (USD)",
    "notes": "GNI per capita is a measure of the total income earned by a country's citizens, adjusted for population size."
  },
  {
    "name": "Poverty Gap Ratio",
    "formula": "Poverty Gap Ratio = (Average Poverty Gap)/Poverty Line",
    "variables": "Average Poverty Gap, Poverty Line",
    "units": "Poverty Gap Ratio (0-1)",
    "notes": "Poverty Gap Ratio measures the average distance between the poor and the poverty line, expressed as a proportion of the poverty line."
  },
  {
    "name": "Human Poverty Index (HPI)",
    "formula": "HPI = (Adult illiteracy rate + Under-five mortality rate + Life expectancy at one)/3",
    "variables": "Adult illiteracy rate, Under-five mortality rate, Life expectancy at one",
    "units": "Adult illiteracy rate (0-1), Under-five mortality rate (0-1), Life expectancy at one (0-1)",
    "notes": "HPI is a composite indicator that reflects the average achievement in three basic dimensions of human development: a long and healthy life, knowledge, and a decent standard of living."
  },
  {
    "name": "Multidimensional Poverty Index (MPI)",
    "formula": "MPI = (1 - (1 - x1)(1 - x2)...(1 - xn))/n",
    "variables": "x1, x2, ..., xn (deprivation scores)",
    "units": "MPI (0-1)",
    "notes": "MPI is a composite indicator that reflects the average achievement in multiple dimensions of well-being, including health, education, and living standards."
  },
  {
    "name": "Millennium Development Goals (MDGs)",
    "formula": "MDGs = 8 Goals, 18 Targets, and 48 Indicators",
    "variables": "8 Goals, 18 Targets, 48 Indicators",
    "units": "-",
    "notes": "MDGs were a set of global development goals that aimed to end poverty, protect the planet, and ensure peace and prosperity for all, adopted by the UN in 2000 and expired in 2015."
  }
]
```

Note: Some of the formulas might be simplified or adapted for better clarity. Please consult the original sources for more detailed and accurate information.
